mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN age BETWEEN 20 AND 39 THEN '20-39岁' WHEN age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40-49岁' WHEN age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN '50-59岁' WHEN age BETWEEN 60 AND 70 THEN '60-70岁' WHEN age BETWEEN 71 AND 80 THEN '71-80岁' ELSE '其他' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM resident_profile WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY CASE WHEN age BETWEEN 20 AND 39 THEN '20-39岁' WHEN age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40-49岁' WHEN age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN '50-59岁' WHEN age BETWEEN 60 AND 70 THEN '60-70岁' WHEN age BETWEEN 71 AND 80 THEN '71-80岁' ELSE '其他' END ORDER BY MIN(age)
